name: Roaz Northern Trade Route
transition_effects: Visible authority, travel expectations, and hazard posture change along this route.
Route use binds local law, economy, and observance timing rather than existing as neutral transit.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Travel along Roaz Northern Trade Route is easiest when intentions, cargo, and patronage are legible before questions begin.
patrol_rhythm: Daylight oversight is visible and procedural; night oversight is thinner, more suspicious, and less forgiving.
after_dark_change: After sunset, traffic thins, trust narrows, and informal power brokers matter more than posted rules.
